top_patterns.description: Short, direct statements often including personal experiences or opinions.
example_quotes: Thanks max for the new @toms chalk bag stitched together with some flag bags.

top_patterns.description: Asks a question to engage or provoke thought, often followed by a personal reflection.
example_quotes: Stop trying to skip the struggle What are your goals?
Where do your @toms shades take you today?

top_patterns.description: Highlights a milestone, achievement, or special moment with enthusiasm.
example_quotes: First summit, nine to go on the #grandtraverse with @pat_dossett @mrgrahamhill @dougworkman @mikepoborsky
Summit's first fish, scroll for play by play. Safely put back in the stream for another lucky boy to catch
Starting up the north ridge of #grandteton on day 2 of #grandtraverse with @pat_dossett
Great to be at the @acehotel for the @toms global sales summit. So many friends and new faces figuring out how to change the 🌎 together!!!
Nothing like opening day on flat creek with @westbankanglers #catchandrelease
Stop trying to skip the struggle What are your goals?
Nothing makes me happier. Nothing beats the original.

language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often under 15 words
language_habits.line_break_style: Mostly single lines, occasional line breaks for emphasis

example_quotes: Thanks max for the new @toms chalk bag stitched together with some flag bags.
Great to be at the @acehotel for the @toms global sales summit.
First summit, nine to go on the #grandtraverse
Summit's first fish, scroll for play by play.

voice_tells.tell: Uses exclamations and emojis for emphasis
example_quotes: Thanks @pat_dossett @mrgrahamhill @dougworkman and @mikepoborsky for a day I will never forget.

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's current Instagram voice is casual, enthusiastic, and personal, emphasizing achievements, moments, and gratitude.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift toward more storytelling and reflection, less formal or promotional language.
